chosen_patch: Allow safe int()/float() builtins in PAL executor (P2).
chosen_patch_rationale: One actionable failure was blocked solely by call_disallowed:int; this is low-risk and runtime-gold-free.

estimated_helped_cases.notes: Direct fix targets openai_gsm8k_95-like safe numeric cast rejections.

next_step_after_patch: patch replay (no-API test pass already complete), then small prompt smoke before larger validation.
